events.description: FPL gameweek metadata including deadlines and top scorer.

field_notes.chip_plays_json: JSON array of {chip_name, num_played} entries for that gameweek.
field_notes.top_element: Player id of the highest-scoring player that gameweek.

fixture_stats.description: Individual stat contributions per player per fixture.

field_notes.identifier: Stat type key such as goals_scored or assists.
field_notes.side: h for home team contribution, a for away team contribution.
field_notes.value: Count of the stat for the player in that fixture.

fixtures.description: All fixtures for the season with scores and difficulty ratings.

field_notes.team_a_difficulty: FPL difficulty rating 1-5 from the away team's perspective.
field_notes.team_h_difficulty: FPL difficulty rating 1-5 from the home team's perspective.

gameweeks.description: Per-player per-round live aggregates from the event live endpoint.

player_histories.description: Per-player per-fixture history from the element-summary endpoint.

field_notes.fixture: Fixture id for the specific match in that round.
field_notes.selected: Absolute owner count at that moment.

players.description: Current-season player snapshot; one row per player.

field_notes.selected_by_percent: Snapshot ownership percentage, not historical ownership.

teams.description: Premier League team metadata and current-season standings.
